context: 1960 was the year bossa nova consolidated as a global phenomenon. João Gilberto's second album introduced compositions by Antonio Carlos Jobim that would become jazz standards worldwide. Brazil was in a period of optimism under President Kubitschek, who had just inaugurated the new capital Brasília, and the cool sophistication of bossa nova perfectly reflected this modernizing spirit.

tracks.title: Samba de Uma Nota Só (One Note Samba)
Eu Sei Que Vou Te Amar
